name: Artichoke Dip
directions: Mix all ingredients in food processor.
Bake at 400 for 15 minutes.
Serve with white corn tortilla chips (Tostitos).

similar.name: Feta and Green olive dip with Chargrilled bread

name: Cream Cheese Dip
directions: In food processor combine all ingredients.
Process until smooth.
Serve with tortilla's, pita's or veggies.

similar.name: Feta and Green olive dip with Chargrilled bread

name: Feta and Green olive dip with Chargrilled bread
directions: Place ricotta olives feta and garlic in the bowl of a food processor and process unit smooth.
preheat a barbecue or char grill on high, brush baguette slices with oil.
cook half of the baguette slices on preheated grill for 1 min each side or until toasted.
serve dip with tomatoes, capsicum and chargrilled bread.

name: Best Ever Beer Cheese
directions: Blend all ingredients together in a food processor.
(Mixer can be used but it takes a long time to get it smooth.) Let stand in refrigerator 24- 48 hours and serve with Crackers or Celery sticks.

name: Shamrock Salad
directions: Dissolve one package of Jell-O into 1-3/4 cups boiling water.
Pour into a shallow pan and chill until firm.
Cut into shamrocks with a cookie cutter.
Dissolve the second package of Jell-O into 1-1/4 cups boiling water; chill until partially thickened.
In a mixer, cream the cheese until smooth.
Add lemon juice, crushed pineapple with liquid and mayonnaise to the cheese mixture.
Combine thoroughly.
Fold cheese mixture into the partially thickened Jell-O.
Gently fold the chopped pecans and celery into the Jell-O mixture.
Turn into a 9-inch square pan and chill until firm.
At serving time, cut salad into 9 squares and arrange on lettuce leaf; top with gelatin shamrocks.

name: Feta Pepper Dip
directions: Blend feta, cream cheese and mayonnaise in a food processor until smooth, scraping the sides of processor a couple of times to make sure it all gets blended.
Put blend in bowl and fold in peppers, scallions, lemon zest and black pepper.
Transfer to the serving bowl and chill for at least 1 hour.
Just before serving, you can drizzle with olive oil, if desired.
This is good served with BBQ potato chips, toasted bread triangles -- whatever you like best!

similar.name: Feta and Green olive dip with Chargrilled bread

name: Kitchenaid Cheddar Cheese Suprises
directions: Place cheddar cheese, flour, butter and paprika in bowl.
Attach bowl and Beater.
Turn to SPEED 2 and mix for one minute.
Form 1 tablespoon of dough around each olive.
Place 2 inches apart on ungreased baking sheets.
Bake at 400F oven for 15 minutes.
Remove from baking sheets and serve immediately while hot.

name: Radish and Goat Cheese Canapes
directions: Trim the tops from the radishes and wash and pat dry.  Chop some of the brightest and freshest tops to make two-thirds cup.
Pulse the chopped tops with the goat cheese in a small food processor until nearly smooth.
Thinly slice the radishes.  Slice the baguette thin and lightly toast.
Spread 2 - 3 teaspoons of the goat cheese mixture on each slice.  Top each slice with 3 or 4 radish slices and sprinkle with coarse salt.  Serve on a platter lined with remaining radish tops.

similar.name: Feta and Green olive dip with Chargrilled bread

name: Enchilada Sauce
ingredients: Cheese, Cheese & Onion, Beef & Cheese Enchilada Fillings
directions: One way is to boil your pods till they fall apart.
The second way is to bust the top off shake out as many seeds as you can then boil them till they fall apart.  I use this way, less seeds to sift through.
When your pods are done cooking drain them from the water.
Separate the 'meat' from the skin and seeds, keep the 'meat'.
Throw the meat, stewed tomatoes, water and garlic into a food processor and blend till it is a sauce.  Add more water till you like the consistency.
Place sauce in a frying pan that is bigger than your tortillas.
Boil it.

In another frying pan bigger than your tortillas add a little bit of your grease heat it and put one tortilla in it just long enough to coat and heat your tortilla (This is a quick process and HOT, do NOT burn yourself!).
Then turn your sauce down to a low simmer and place your tortilla in it, flip it over take it out.
Lay your tortilla out you can fill it right away or allow it to cool.  It depends on how brave your fingers are.
Keep repeating this process till you run out of tortillas or you run out of sauce adding oil to the pan as you need to.
Fill with your ingredients from "Cheese, Cheese Onion, Beef & Cheese Enchilada Filling Recipe #165663".
Fold over twice.
Place in greased cake pan when full cover with cheese and bake till hot and the cheese is melted.
Bake time depends on when you cook it right away or later on.

If you run out of room in your cake pan you can use another pan (and more dishes) or just stack the extra ones on top of the others being sure to put cheese on the first layer before you add the second layer.
Serve.

name: Mom's Dip
directions: mix cottage cheese and lemon juice in blender or food processor until creamy and smooth texture.
Add in all the rest of the ingredients and blend until evenly distributed throughout dip.
Serve with potato chips or raw veggies.

similar.name: Feta and Green olive dip with Chargrilled bread

name: Ale and Cheddar Soup
directions: In a large saucepan, heat butter over medium-high heat.
Add bacon and sauté for 1 minute.
Add onion; sauté for 2 minutes or until tender.
Add flour; reduce heat to medium; cook for 30 seconds, stirring constantly.
Add stock and ale; increase heat to high and bring to a boil.
Add potatoes; return to a boil.
Reduce heat and simmer for 20 minutes or until potatoes are tender.
Transfer soup in batched to the food processor and process until smooth.
Add cheese and stir until melted.
Stir in cream, salt and pepper.
Taste and adjust seasonings.
Note: Do not boil this soup again or it will curdle.

name: Speedy Hot Artichoke Dip
directions: Place artichokes, cream cheese, parmesan, green onions and jalapenos in a food processor. Mix until desired consistency - smooth is nice but chunky is OK too.
Transfer to small oven safe casserole and gently fold in mayonnaise.
Top with 1/4 cup parmesan.
Bake at 350F for 15 minutes or until golden and bubbly.
Serve with baguette, tortilla chips or crackers.

name: Macaroni and Cheese - Microwave Version
directions: Cook macaroni.
Put 3 tablespoons butter in a large (1 1/2 quart) casserole.  Microwave until melted.
Blend in flour, salt, mustard, pepper, and hot sauce.  Stir in milk.  Microwave until thick (4-6 minutes), whisking once or twice during this time.
Stir in cheese.  Microwave 30-90 seconds to soften/melt cheese.
Stir in cooked macaroni.
In a small bowl, melt 3 tablespoons butter in the microwave.  Stir in bread crumbs.  Sprinkle over casserole.
Microwave at 70% power for 5-7 minutes.

name: Watercress and Pistachios Pesto
directions: In a food processor, finely chop all ingredients except the oil.  Incorporate the oil in the whole of the food processor while it's on until you have a creamy consistancy and lightly grainy.  Add salt to taste.

similar.name: Feta and Green olive dip with Chargrilled bread
